heading: Your business keeps its truth in two places.
body: What gets said lives in email, texts, and the call you took this morning. What gets kept lives in the books. Between them stands a person — retyping Tuesday's order into Thursday's ledger, copying figures from one screen to another, chasing the line that never made it across.

docket.note: Waiting on someone to type it into the books.

close: It shouldn't be a person's job to be the bridge.
